narrative:
Precinct Toledo 2D (precinct in Lucas County) has 967 registered voters, with 73.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 19.3 percentage points.
